title: Infosys Recognized Among Top 3 Most Valuable IT Services Brands Globally
detailed_summary: Infosys announced that Brand Finance recognized it as one of the world's top 3 most valuable IT services brands in the Brand Finance Global 500 2026 report. The release states Infosys had a brand value of US$ 16.4 billion in 2026, a 15% CAGR in brand value over six years, and ranked #80 in the Global 500 2026.

key_facts.fact: Brand Finance recognized Infosys as one of the world's top 3 most valuable IT services brands.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys is the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally with a CAGR of 15% in Brand Value

key_facts.fact: Infosys was recognized as the fastest-growing IT services brand with 15% CAGR over the last six years and a brand value of US$ 16.4 billion in 2026.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys is the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally with a CAGR of 15% in Brand Value

key_facts.fact: Infosys achieved a Brand Strength Index score of 86.8 out of 100 and ranked #80 within the Global 500 2026, an improvement of 16 places over the 2025 ranking.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys is the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally with a CAGR of 15% in Brand Value
